description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - DeFiCh/metachain-ts-suite that runs on workflow dispatch and pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have concurrent job management, cancelling in-progress jobs for non-master branches. It consists of two ubuntu-latest jobs: build and test. The build job checks out the repository, populates the environment, sets up dependencies, uses a Rust cache, builds binaries, and uploads them as an artifact. The test job, dependent on build, checks out a separate test repository, downloads the binaries, sets up permissions, installs Node.js 18, installs dependencies, compiles contracts, and runs tests.
